R-AC-1.title: Unauthorized Access
R-AC-1.description: Risk of unauthorized individuals gaining access to systems, data, or facilities

R-AC-2.title: Excessive Privileges
R-AC-2.description: Risk of users having more access rights than needed for their job functions

R-AC-3.title: Credential Compromise
R-AC-3.description: Risk of authentication credentials being stolen or misused

R-AC-4.title: Session Hijacking
R-AC-4.description: Risk of active sessions being taken over by malicious actors

R-AM-1.title: Unmanaged Assets
R-AM-1.description: Risk of assets not being properly tracked or managed throughout their lifecycle

R-AM-2.title: Asset Misconfiguration
R-AM-2.description: Risk of assets being improperly configured leading to vulnerabilities

R-AM-3.title: Unpatched Systems
R-AM-3.description: Risk of systems running with known vulnerabilities due to missing patches

R-BC-1.title: Service Disruption
R-BC-1.description: Risk of critical services becoming unavailable

R-BC-2.title: Data Loss
R-BC-2.description: Risk of permanent loss of critical data

R-BC-3.title: Recovery Failure
R-BC-3.description: Risk of inability to restore systems or data after an incident

R-BC-4.title: Inadequate Planning
R-BC-4.description: Risk of insufficient business continuity planning for critical operations

R-BC-5.title: Communication Failure
R-BC-5.description: Risk of communication breakdowns during business continuity events

R-EX-1.title: Regulatory Non-Compliance
R-EX-1.description: Risk of failing to meet regulatory or legal requirements

R-EX-2.title: Contractual Breach
R-EX-2.description: Risk of violating contractual security obligations

R-EX-3.title: Reputational Damage
R-EX-3.description: Risk of harm to organizational reputation from security incidents

R-EX-4.title: Legal Liability
R-EX-4.description: Risk of legal action resulting from security failures

R-EX-5.title: Geopolitical Impact
R-EX-5.description: Risk of geopolitical events affecting operations or data sovereignty

R-EX-6.title: Economic Disruption
R-EX-6.description: Risk of economic conditions impacting security investment or operations

R-EX-7.title: Environmental Hazard
R-EX-7.description: Risk of natural disasters or environmental events disrupting operations

R-GV-1.title: Policy Gap
R-GV-1.description: Risk of missing or inadequate security policies

R-GV-2.title: Role Ambiguity
R-GV-2.description: Risk of unclear security roles and responsibilities

R-GV-3.title: Resource Constraints
R-GV-3.description: Risk of insufficient resources for security operations

R-GV-4.title: Strategy Misalignment
R-GV-4.description: Risk of security not aligning with business objectives

R-GV-5.title: Oversight Failure
R-GV-5.description: Risk of inadequate management oversight of security

R-GV-6.title: Compliance Drift
R-GV-6.description: Risk of security controls gradually falling out of compliance over time

R-GV-7.title: Metrics Gap
R-GV-7.description: Risk of inadequate security metrics preventing informed decision-making

R-GV-8.title: Culture Deficiency
R-GV-8.description: Risk of weak security culture undermining control effectiveness

R-IR-1.title: Delayed Detection
R-IR-1.description: Risk of incidents not being detected in a timely manner

R-IR-3.title: Evidence Loss
R-IR-3.description: Risk of losing forensic evidence during incident handling

R-IR-4.title: Communication Breakdown
R-IR-4.description: Risk of poor communication during incident response

R-SA-1.title: Threat Blindness
R-SA-1.description: Risk of being unaware of emerging threats

R-SA-2.title: Vulnerability Ignorance
R-SA-2.description: Risk of not knowing about existing vulnerabilities

R-SA-3.title: Context Loss
R-SA-3.description: Risk of losing situational context for security decisions

R-SC-1.title: Vendor Compromise
R-SC-1.description: Risk of supply chain partners being compromised

R-SC-2.title: Third-Party Dependency
R-SC-2.description: Risk of over-reliance on third-party services

R-SC-3.title: Component Tampering
R-SC-3.description: Risk of malicious modification to software or hardware components

R-SC-4.title: Supplier Failure
R-SC-4.description: Risk of critical suppliers failing to deliver

R-SC-5.title: Counterfeit Components
R-SC-5.description: Risk of counterfeit or substandard components entering the supply chain

R-SC-6.title: Concentration Risk
R-SC-6.description: Risk of excessive dependency on a single supplier or geographic region
